How to Join

The server is whitelisted. Contact an admin to get added before joining.

To get whitelisted, email admin@lmc.kervian.com or find Bennett at Labyrinth.

Java Edition
Server Address labyrinth.bh-games.com
Port 25565

Bedrock Edition

The server runs Geyser and Floodgate, so Bedrock players can join too.
Server Address labyrinth.bh-games.com
Port 19132

PC & iPad

Enter the server address and port above in the Add Server screen.

Consoles

Console support is still being worked out for the new Bedrock UI. Check back later.
